relevance_evidence: organisation as a whole can learn

relevance_spans.text: The organisational learning literature shows us that firms can learn to be better at what they do and that this learning can be captured in many places Firstly the projects and programmes we investigating are examples of knowledge work

relevance_spans.phrase: organisation as a whole can learn
relevance_spans.text: This way, the organisation as a whole can learn.
Finally, much of an organisation's memory can be captured in routines and procedures updated over time.

title: Neil Turner on Organisational Learning
